page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter Payment Methods: Cards, Cash, and Deposits

data.meta_description: Learn the Marbella yacht charter payment methods we accept: credit/debit cards, bank transfer, and cash deposit. Clear terms, no hidden fees.
data.summary: A practical guide to payment methods for chartering a yacht in Marbella, covering credit cards, bank transfers, and cash deposits with clear terms and no hidden fees.
key_facts: We accept Visa, Mastercard, and American Express for deposits and final payments.
Bank transfers are welcome for bookings made at least 7 days in advance.
A 50% deposit secures your charter; the balance is due 48 hours before departure.
Cash payments in EUR are accepted at the marina on the day (no surcharge).
All prices on our site include 21% Spanish IVA — no extra taxes.
Deposits are fully refundable if cancelled 14+ days before the charter.
Last-minute bookings (within 48h) require full payment by card or cash.
We never charge hidden fees for processing payments.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept for a yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), bank transfers, and cash in EUR. For online bookings, card or bank transfer is preferred. Cash is accepted at the marina on the day of departure.

faq.q: Is there a deposit required to book a yacht charter?
faq.a: Yes, a 50% deposit is required to secure your booking. The remaining balance is due 48 hours before your charter. Deposits are fully refundable if you cancel at least 14 days before departure.

faq.q: Can I pay by bank transfer from outside Spain?
faq.a: Yes, international bank transfers are accepted. Please allow 3–5 business days for the transfer to clear. We provide our IBAN and SWIFT details upon request. A transfer fee may apply depending on your bank.

faq.q: Do you charge extra for credit card payments?
faq.a: No, we do not charge any surcharge for card payments. The price you see on our site includes everything: skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.

faq.q: What happens if I need to cancel my charter?
faq.a: Cancellations made 14+ days before the charter receive a full refund. Between 7 and 13 days, you get a 50% refund. Within 7 days, no refund is available. You can also reschedule subject to availability.

faq.q: Can I pay in cash on the day of the charter?
faq.a: Yes, cash in euros is accepted at the marina on the day. Please note that cash payments must be for the full remaining balance. We do not accept cash for deposits.

faq.q: Is it safe to pay by card for a Marbella yacht charter?
faq.a: Absolutely. Our payment gateway uses 256-bit SSL encryption. Your card details are never stored. We are fully GDPR-compliant and process payments through a trusted European bank.

faq.q: Do you offer payment plans or instalments?
faq.a: For charters over €5,000, we can arrange a custom payment plan (e.g., 25% deposit, 25% at 30 days, balance 48 hours prior). Please contact us via WhatsApp to discuss.

data.body_html:
When booking a Marbella yacht charter, knowing how and when to pay is just as important as choosing the right boat. We keep things straightforward: no hidden fees, no surprises. Whether you prefer card, bank transfer, or cash, here is exactly how our payment process works.

Payment Methods We Accept

We offer three secure payment options for your charter in Marbella:

  • Credit/Debit Cards – Visa, Mastercard, and American Express. Processed via a secure online gateway. No surcharge.
  • Bank Transfer – Ideal for bookings made at least 7 days in advance. We provide IBAN and SWIFT details on request.
  • Cash – Euros only, accepted at the marina on the day of departure (for the final balance).

All prices on our site include 21% Spanish IVA. What you see is what you pay. For a full list of our fleet and pricing, visit our Marbella boat rental hub.

Deposit and Balance Schedule

To secure your booking, we require a 50% deposit. The remaining balance is due 48 hours before departure. This applies to all charters, including our popular Azimut 39 and Astondoa 40 (both from €749 for 2 hours).

For last-minute bookings (within 48 hours), full payment is required immediately by card or bank transfer. Cash is not accepted for deposits.

Cancellation and Refund Policy

We understand plans change. Here is our straightforward cancellation policy:

  • 14+ days before charter – Full refund of deposit.
  • 7–13 days before charter – 50% refund of deposit.
  • Within 7 days – No refund, but you can reschedule subject to availability.

All refunds are processed within 10 business days to the original payment method. For more details, see our terms and conditions.

Pricing Transparency: What’s Included

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA. No extra charges. For example, our Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) starts at €4,719 for 4 hours, including a free jet ski. No hidden fees.

Security and Data Protection

Your payment is processed through a 256-bit SSL encrypted gateway. We do not store your card details. We are fully GDPR-compliant and use a trusted European banking partner. If you have any concerns, contact us via WhatsApp.

Frequently asked questions

What payment methods do you accept for a yacht charter in Marbella?

We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), bank transfers, and cash in EUR. For online bookings, card or bank transfer is preferred. Cash is accepted at the marina on the day of departure.

Is there a deposit required to book a yacht charter?

Yes, a 50% deposit is required to secure your booking. The remaining balance is due 48 hours before your charter. Deposits are fully refundable if you cancel at least 14 days before departure.

Can I pay by bank transfer from outside Spain?

Yes, international bank transfers are accepted. Please allow 3–5 business days for the transfer to clear. We provide our IBAN and SWIFT details upon request. A transfer fee may apply depending on your bank.

Do you charge extra for credit card payments?

No, we do not charge any surcharge for card payments. The price you see on our site includes everything: skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.

What happens if I need to cancel my charter?

Cancellations made 14+ days before the charter receive a full refund. Between 7 and 13 days, you get a 50% refund. Within 7 days, no refund is available. You can also reschedule subject to availability.

Can I pay in cash on the day of the charter?

Yes, cash in euros is accepted at the marina on the day. Please note that cash payments must be for the full remaining balance. We do not accept cash for deposits.

Is it safe to pay by card for a Marbella yacht charter?

Absolutely. Our payment gateway uses 256-bit SSL encryption. Your card details are never stored. We are fully GDPR-compliant and process payments through a trusted European bank.

Do you offer payment plans or instalments?

For charters over €5,000, we can arrange a custom payment plan (e.g., 25% deposit, 25% at 30 days, balance 48 hours prior). Please contact us via WhatsApp to discuss.
